CVE-2019-15691.title: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to stack use-after ...
CVE-2019-15691.summary: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to stack use-after-return, which occurs due to incorrect usage of stack memory in ZRLEDecoder. If decoding routine would throw an exception, ZRLEDecoder may try to access stack variable, which has been already freed during the process of stack unwinding. Exploitation of this vulnerability could potentially result into remote code execution. This attack appear to be exploitable via network connectivity.

CVE-2019-15692.title: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer ove ...
CVE-2019-15692.summary: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer overflow. Vulnerability could be triggered from CopyRectDecoder due to incorrect value checks. Exploitation of this vulnerability could potentially result into remote code execution. This attack appear to be exploitable via network connectivity.

CVE-2019-15693.title: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer ove ...
CVE-2019-15693.summary: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer overflow, which occurs in TightDecoder::FilterGradient. Exploitation of this vulnerability could potentially result into remote code execution. This attack appear to be exploitable via network connectivity.

CVE-2019-15694.title: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer ove ...
CVE-2019-15694.summary: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to heap buffer overflow, which could be triggered from DecodeManager::decodeRect. Vulnerability occurs due to the signdness error in processing MemOutStream. Exploitation of this vulnerability could potentially result into remote code execution. This attack appear to be exploitable via network connectivity.

CVE-2019-15695.title: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to stack buffer ov ...
CVE-2019-15695.summary: TigerVNC version prior to 1.10.1 is vulnerable to stack buffer overflow, which could be triggered from CMsgReader::readSetCursor. This vulnerability occurs due to insufficient sanitization of PixelFormat. Since remote attacker can choose offset from start of the buffer to start writing his values, exploitation of this vulnerability could potentially result into remote code execution. This attack appear to be exploitable via network connectivity.

CVE-2020-26117.title: In rfb/CSecurityTLS.cxx and rfb/CSecurityTLS.java in TigerVNC bef ...
CVE-2020-26117.summary: In rfb/CSecurityTLS.cxx and rfb/CSecurityTLS.java in TigerVNC before 1.11.0, viewers mishandle TLS certificate exceptions. They store the certificates as authorities, meaning that the owner of a certificate could impersonate any server after a client had added an exception.

CVE-2023-1393.title: A flaw was found in X.Org Server Overlay Window. A Use-After-Free ...
CVE-2023-1393.summary: A flaw was found in X.Org Server Overlay Window. A Use-After-Free may lead to local privilege escalation. If a client explicitly destroys the compositor overlay window (aka COW), the Xserver would leave a dangling pointer to that window in the CompScreen structure, which will trigger a use-after-free later.

CVE-2023-1393.title: A flaw was found in X.Org Server Overlay Window. A Use-After-Free ...
CVE-2023-1393.summary: A flaw was found in X.Org Server Overlay Window. A Use-After-Free may lead to local privilege escalation. If a client explicitly destroys the compositor overlay window (aka COW), the Xserver would leave a dangling pointer to that window in the CompScreen structure, which will trigger a use-after-free later.
